title: Executive Order 8435—Modifying Executive Order of November 21, 1916, Creating Power Site Reserve No. 565
text:
SNAKE RIVER, IDAHO
MODIFICATION NO. 411
By virtue of the authority vested in me by the act of June 25, 1910, ch. 421, 36 Stat. 847, as amended by the act of August 24, 1912, ch. 369, 37 Stat. 497, it is ordered that the Executive Order of November 21, 1916, creating Power Site Reserve No. 565, as affected by Order of Interpretation No. 13, approved April 22, 1922, be, and it is hereby, modified to the extent necessary to permit the State of Idaho to construct a highway over lots 8, 9, 12, and 13, sec. 34, T. 9 S., R. 17 E., Boise meridian, Idaho, as shown on the map on file in the General Land Office, Department of the Interior, bearing the title
"STATE OF IDAHO
DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS
BUREAU OF HIGHWAYS
MAP SHOWING
RIGHT OF WAY THROUGH
POWER SITE RESERVE-No. 565
S. A. P. 28—C
SAWTOOTH PARK HIGHWAY
JEROME COUNTY
Scale 1"=200' March 30, 1938
Boise, Idaho."
on condition that use of the highway shall be discontinued without liability or expense to the United States or its licensees when found by the Secretary of the Interior to be in conflict with project works authorized by the United States.
FRANKLIN D. ROOSEVELT
The White House,
June 10, 1940.
